description: Java polyglot AppHost support is now much closer to the TypeScript experience, with improved generated SDK ergonomics (unions, optional/nullability, callbacks), a runnable JavaAppHost playground, CI validation, and a new `Empty (Java AppHost)` template. Integer values passed from Java are now correctly coerced to the expected CLR integral types. Enable with `aspire config set -g features.experimentalPolyglot:java true`.
name: Java polyglot AppHost support improvements (experimental)
